query: SELECT lock_week, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM schedule_locks GROUP BY lock_week ORDER BY lock_week DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LTmfYgwcE1mg9cB.root --database Jdx475rzuNGCt88odzGLDy --execute SELECT lock_week, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM schedule_locks GROUP BY lock_week ORDER BY lock_week DESC LIMIT 10;
